meta.description: Somatic marker database - emotional tags for pattern-based intuition
meta.theory: Damasio's somatic marker hypothesis: emotions guide reasoning by marking experiences

markers.description: Making trades quickly without full analysis, especially near market close
markers.learning: Speed + FOMO = high loss probability. Wait for next day setup.

markers.description: Following fresh smart money flow at market open
markers.learning: Morning institutional positioning ≠ late-day retail chase

markers.description: Maintaining position during consolidation/choppy price action
markers.learning: Chop is normal. Not every move requires action. Patience.

markers.description: Trading to make back losses rather than based on signal
markers.learning: Never trade from emotion. Each trade stands alone.

markers.description: Putting large portion of capital in single trade
markers.learning: Position sizing is THE most important risk control.

markers.description: Explicitly showing reasoning about why this differs from past mistake

outcomes.context: Orion approved SLV after reasoning shown

markers.learning: Permission comes from SHOWING the learning, not just executing.

confidence_calibration.description: Tracks how reliable this marker is based on outcome history
